title: danthonia calycina var. breviaristata
intro: Danthonia calycina var. breviaristata, also known as a type of grass, is a plant species in the Poaceae family that is native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Danthonia calycina var. breviaristata include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to soothe digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Danthonia calycina var. breviaristata can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
